title: Relay Ghost
text: A dead station keeps routing distress calls through your bones.
flavor: Every message arrives addressed to a name you almost remember.
trigger: At the start of your turn while you have 3 or more Heat.
penalty: Gain a relay note, then advance escalation by 1 if you ignore it this round.

effect.text: Relay Ghost calling: answer a route signal this round or advance escalation by 1.

relief: Pass a signal check at any relay, shrine, or anomaly space to quiet the ghost for the session.
upside: If you answer the call, gain 1 trophy from recovered coordinates.
